binary_metadata.file_type: ELF 64-bit LSB pie executable, x86-64, version 1 (SYSV), dynamically linked, interpreter /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2, BuildID[sha1]=f732b9d3d7a0790356dfb6215494bb0949c40294, for GNU/Linux 3.2.0, stripped

apt_metadata.description:
Stress tester for the SSL handshake
THC-SSL-DOS is a tool to verify the performance of SSL.
.
Establishing a secure SSL connection requires 15x more processing
power on the server than on the client.
.
THC-SSL-DOS exploits this asymmetric property by overloading the
server and knocking it off the Internet.
.
This problem affects all SSL implementations today. The vendors are aware
of this problem since 2003 and the topic has been widely discussed.
.
This attack further exploits the SSL secure Renegotiation feature
to trigger thousands of renegotiations via single TCP connection.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use thc-ssl-dos because ### thc-ssl-dos.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair thc-ssl-dos with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `thc-ssl-dos --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### thc-ssl-dos.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install thc-ssl-dos
